{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Regent of the South
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regent of the South]] is a visitor to the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Regent of the South]] is a man who refers to himself as having an oath to eternity.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“The Consultants have a visitor,” Teach said, as she handed the winged lizard’s reins to Andel. “The Regent of the South.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Regent of the South tipped his hat back, scratching at his hairline. “My oath to eternity, it’s not so large a request.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
